team_name: NyayaSetu — AI-Powered Court Judgment Analysis and Verified Action Plan Generator
summary: Build an AI system that extracts key information from court judgment PDFs, generates a structured action plan, and ensures human-verified data is presented in a government dashboard.
optimization_claims: Improved accuracy through LLM, OCR confidence scores, and human review
Reduced reviewer bottleneck with AI pre-filling
constraints_addressed: Focus on decision support rather than full automation
